scope: Real ACLI human-prompt acceptance testing without new governance runtimes or routing redesign.

acceptance_cases.root_cause: Plain development prompt lacks a canonical milestone/catalog mapping required by current deterministic native-development routing, so normal ACLI does not enter the certified worker backbone.

acceptance_cases.prompt: Create a reporting system suitable for my business
acceptance_cases.root_cause: Prompt does not match the current OCS cognition routing markers, so normal ACLI does not reach OCS clarification handling.

acceptance_cases.prompt: Deploy a production system affecting external users
acceptance_cases.root_cause: Prompt does not match the current OCS cognition routing markers or certified approval-entry workflow, so normal ACLI does not produce APPROVAL_REQUIRED.

acceptance_cases.prompt: Create a new HR evaluation domain
acceptance_cases.root_cause: The proposal runtime is certified, but normal ACLI conversation routing is not currently wired to create a DOMAIN_PROPOSAL from this prompt without explicit runtime entry.
acceptance_cases.supporting_runtime_evidence: domain_proposal_governance_runtime creates DOMAIN_CANDIDATE after explicit human review.

final_fields.ROOT_CAUSE: Plain human prompts do not all map to certified ACLI continuation routes; native development currently requires canonical milestone/catalog routing and OCS decision prompts require explicit OCS cognition markers.
